name: Health
description: Physical and mental wellbeing — exercise, sleep, nutrition, and stress management.

projects.name: Weightloss
projects.description: Tracking nutrition and exercise to hit a target weight through consistent habits.

tasks.title: Research workout programs
tasks.description: Compare HIIT, strength training, and hybrid programs to find the best fit.

tasks.title: Schedule weekly gym sessions
tasks.description: Block time on the calendar for 3 sessions per week.

prerequisite.title: Pick a gym
prerequisite.description: Evaluate nearby gyms by cost, equipment, and hours.

tasks.title: Log meals for one week
tasks.description: Use a calorie tracking app to establish a baseline intake.

name: Learning
description: Ongoing skill development — courses, books, side projects, and professional growth.

projects.name: Mindtracer - Frontend
projects.description: Building the React/TypeScript frontend that consumes the mindtracer API.

prerequisite.name: Mindtracer - Backend
prerequisite.description: Building the Go REST API for the mindtracer app — PARA models, CRUD endpoints, and auth.

tasks.title: Design PARA data models
tasks.description: Define Area, Project, ToDo, and Resource structs with GORM tags.

tasks.title: Implement CRUD endpoints for Areas
tasks.description: Build GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE handlers for the /areas resource.

prerequisite.title: Wire up GORM migrations
prerequisite.description: Register all models in migrate.go and verify schema creation.

tasks.title: Set up React project with TypeScript
tasks.description: Scaffold with Vite, configure tsconfig, and install base dependencies.

tasks.title: Build Area list view
tasks.description: Fetch and display all Areas from the API with basic styling.

prerequisite.title: Create API client module
prerequisite.description: Set up a typed fetch wrapper that handles auth headers and errors.

name: Literacy
description: Reading habits and comprehension — books, articles, and building a consistent reading practice.

projects.name: Reading List
projects.description: Working through a curated list of books with notes and key takeaways.

tasks.title: Read 'Unapologetic ADHD'
tasks.description: Work through the full book, highlighting key frameworks and strategies.

tasks.title: Write key takeaways
tasks.description: Summarize the most actionable insights into a personal reference note.

prerequisite.title: Finish reading 'Unapologetic ADHD'
prerequisite.description: Complete the final chapters before summarizing.
